remarks: Fully Furnished & All Utilities Included: Prime Turnkey Living in Downtown Westport  Experience the ultimate in convenience and coastal charm with this bright and cozy 2-bedroom, 1-bathroom apartment located right in the heart of Westport. Situated in a historic charm-filled brick building, this unit offers an unbeatable lifestyle for commuters or anyone looking to enjoy the very best and convenience of Fairfield County living. Step out your front door and you are immediately immersed in the vibrant energy of the Saugatuck and Downtown Westport areas. Access to the prestigious Westport School District (Saugatuck Elementary, Staples High School). Fully furnished, all-inclusive in this highly sought-after, walk-to-town location rarely stay on the market long.
